Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('./data/story.db'\);db.prepare\('DELETE FROM stories WHERE id=1'\).run\(\);console.log\('Deleted garbled story id=1'\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT id,title FROM stories'\).all\(\);rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\('id:',r.id,'title:',r.title\)\)")
